news.title_en: Solana DeFi TVL Rises 12% This Week
news.summary_zh: Solana生态总锁仓量本周上涨12%，主要受新晋DEX交易量增长推动。
news.summary_en: Solana’s total DeFi TVL rose 12% this week, driven by growing trading volume on new DEXs, per DeFiLlama.

news.title_en: Cardano Reveals Plutus V4 Upgrade Roadmap for 2026
news.summary_zh: IOG团队发布Plutus V4路线图，预计2026年Q3上线主网，将增强智能合约表达能力并降低手续费。
news.summary_en: IOG released Plutus V4 roadmap, targeting mainnet in Q3 2026, featuring stronger smart contract expressiveness and lower fees.

news.title_en: Chainlink CCIP Adds Support for 5 Major Blockchains
news.summary_zh: Chainlink跨链互操作协议CCIP新增支持Avalanche、Polygon zkEVM、Base、Arbitrum和Optimism五条主流公链。
news.summary_en: Chainlink’s Cross-Chain Interoperability Protocol (CCIP) now supports Avalanche, Polygon zkEVM, Base, Arbitrum, and Optimism, expanding multi-chain connectivity.

news.title_zh: 狗狗币拟引入ZK-Rollup Layer2方案
news.title_en: Dogecoin Core Devs Propose ZK-Rollup Layer2 Solution
news.summary_zh: Dogecoin基金会研究小组发布草案，探讨基于ZK-Rollup的Layer2扩容方案，旨在降低小额转账手续费。
news.summary_en: Dogecoin Foundation research group drafts a ZK-Rollup-based Layer2 scaling proposal to reduce transaction fees for micro-payments.
